qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SSRF via workflow import-from-url endpoint allows authenticated users to reach internal network services
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes SSRF via missing URL validation in /rest/workflows/from-url endpoint. The advisory describes credential authorization bypass in dynamic-node-parameters endpoints allowing foreign credential ID usage. These are different root causes: SSRF protection vs credential authorization.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The qualifying finding does not identify the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause. The advisory describes a credential authorization bypass in n8n's dynamic-node-parameters endpoints that allows authenticated users to supply foreign credential IDs, leading to credential exfiltration. The finding describes SSRF via missing URL validation in /rest/workflows/from-url endpoint. These are fundamentally different root causes from the advisory's credential authorization bypass.
evidence: Advisory describes credential authorization bypass in dynamic-node-parameters endpoints allowing foreign credential ID usage
Finding describes SSRF in /rest/workflows/from-url endpoint due to missing SSRF protection
Different vulnerable endpoints, different root causes, different security properties
